content.text:
[cron:feee69f8-6016-4f8f-a09c-08b39d9a9191 github-backup] Run these commands: cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet && echo "nothing to commit" || (git commit -m "auto backup" && git push). Report result to Nemesis via message(action=send, channel=telegram, target=7924461837) only if there was an error. If nothing changed, reply NO_REPLY.
Current time: Sunday, April 12th, 2026 - 10:01 AM (UTC) / 2026-04-12 10:01 UTC

content.thinking: This is a cron job to auto-commit and push git changes. Let me execute it.

content.thinking: The push failed due to GitHub push protection - secrets detected in some session reset files. I need to report this error to Nemesis.

arguments.message:
GitHub push blocked - secrets detected in session reset files. The auto backup failed with this error:

```
remote: - Push cannot contain secrets
```

The secrets are in old `.jsonl.reset.*` files from previous commits. You'll need to either:
1. Allow the secret at https://github.com/tempint001-cpu/openclaw-workspace/security/secret-scanning/unblock-secret/3CFins0vGjwoFvqUMYhPOONNMU2
2. Or I can remove those old reset files and recommit

content.thinking: The error has been reported to Nemesis. Done.
